fun_fact: Sports aren't immune to a warming world, and tennis is feeling it too. With Paris in the middle of a week-long heatwave, the French Open has shifted several matches to cooler night sessions. Even that wasn't enough for world No. 1 Jannik Sinner, who crashed out in the second round after what looked like heat cramps. [Read more](https://www.bbc.com/sport/tennis/articles/c70vvyvngy5o).
